aVertexIdNote: Read float attribute _VERTEXID per vertex and round() it -> exact 0..vertCount-1 (meshopt reorders vertices, so values are a permutation, but each is an exact integer id). Use as the VAT texture column (x).
encoding: RGB = (val - min) / (max - min) in 0..255; A unused. Decode: val = min + (rgb/255)*(max-min).
note: Sample texel (x=vertexId, y=clip.row+frame). World-meters, feet at y~=0, rig faces +Z.
